nodes.name: 新斯科舍省
nodes.summary: 新斯科舍省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联6种鸟类，包括蓝翅鸭、北极海鹦、环嘴鸥等6种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: 蓝翅鸭
nodes.summary: 蓝翅鸭（Blue-winged teal，学名 Spatula discors），分类上属于雁形目，并归入鸭科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联8个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括沼泽、滩涂、湿地。

nodes.name: 滩涂
nodes.summary: 迁飞水鸟高度依赖的滨海觅食带。

nodes.name: 北美洲

nodes.name: 鸭科

nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

nodes.name: 得克萨斯州

nodes.summary: Pea Island是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括蓝翅鸭，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 雁形目

nodes.name: 北卡罗来纳州

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 阿拉斯加州
nodes.summary: 阿拉斯加州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联54种鸟类，包括黑嘴天鹅、小加拿大雁、帝雁等54种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: One of the smaller members of the dabbling duck group, it occurs in North America, where it breeds from southern Alaska to Nova Scotia, and south to northern Texas. It winters along the Pacific and Atlantic coasts and south into the Caribbean islands and Central America

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Department of Agriculture, Forest Service|display-authors=etal}} The western blue-winged teal inhabits that part of the breeding range west of the Appalachian Mountains

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Some populations of blue-winged teals nest along the Atlantic Coast from New Brunswick to Pea Island, North Carolina. They migrate in flocks to winter in to the south of its breeding range

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The breeding habitat of the blue-winged teal is marshes and ponds.{{cite book|last1=Dunn|first1= J

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: They inhabit inland marshes, lakes, ponds, pools, and shallow streams with dense emergent vegetation. In coastal areas, breeding occurs in salt-marsh meadows with adjoining ponds or creeks. Blue-winged teal use rocks protruding above water, muskrat houses, trunks or limbs of fallen trees, bare stretches of shoreline, or mud flats for resting sites. Blue-winged teal winter on shallow inland freshwater marshes and brackish and saltwater marshes. They build their nests on dry ground in grassy sites such as bluegrass meadows, hayfields, and sedge meadows

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The blue-winged teal is also found in wetlands of boreal forest associations, shortgrass prairies, tallgrass prairies, and deciduous woodlands. This duck commonly inhabits wetland communities dominated by bulrush (Scirpus spp.), cattail (Typha spp.), pondweed (Potamogeton spp.), sedges (Carex spp.), widgeongrass (Ruppia maritima), and other emergent and aquatic vegetation. During molting, it often remains among extensive beds of bulrushes and cattails
